name: summernote-react-monorepo
description: React + TypeScript port of summernote (zero-dep editor engine + React bindings)

scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @eaeao4jerry/summernote-core typecheck && yarn workspace @eaeao4jerry/summernote-react typecheck
scripts.verify: yarn lint:no-jquery && yarn check:deps && yarn typecheck
scripts.build:packages: yarn workspace @eaeao4jerry/summernote-core build && yarn workspace @eaeao4jerry/summernote-react build
scripts.release: yarn verify && yarn build:packages && changeset publish
